title: cyclosorus pendens
intro: Cyclosorus pendens, also known as the hanging spleenwort or maidenhair fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Blechnaceae and is native to tropical and subtropical regions. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cyclosorus pendens include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. The herbal preparations of Cyclosorus pendens include decoctions, infusions, and poultices, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
